```text
    47→

   242→      {inputs.slice(1, -1).map((input) => (

   245→
   246→      <div className="mb-4 flex gap-2">
   247→        <FormInput {...(inputs.at(-1) as InputFieldProps)} />
   248→        <Select

   253→            { label: t('time_hour'), value: 'h' },

   258→      </div>

   260→      <div className="center flex w-full gap-2">
```

<analysis>
Let me go through the conversation chronologically to capture all important details.

1. **Initial Request**: User asked to replicate the UI/UX design from `<TMP_DIR>/b_2V3j51h3UWt-1773390512954/components/site-header.tsx` into the Shiroi project's header desktop menu.

2. **Analysis Phase**: I read both the reference design and the existing Shiroi header code. The reference design used `@base-ui/react` with `Menu.createHandle` for a shared menu with direction-aware animations. The existing Shiroi header used `FloatPopover` for individual submenus.

3. **Approach Discussion**: I proposed 3 approaches (A: @base-ui/react, B: custom implementation, C: visual-only). User pointed out @base-ui/react was already in use (v1.2.0).

4. **Data Layer Discussion**: User asked about missing data. I analyzed what APIs exist vs what's needed. Categories with counts exist, recent posts per category need lazy fetch, topic counts and moments stats may need backend work.

5. **User chose frontend first**: "先做前端 shared menu 骨架"

6. **API Version Investigation**: I discovered `Menu.Viewport` doesn't exist in v1.2.0. Found `NavigationMenu` component exists in base-ui. User agreed to upgrade to 1.3.0 and use NavigationMenu.

7. **Upgrade & Implementation**: 
   - Upgraded @base-ui/react from 1.2.0 to 1.3.0
   - Created `nav-menu.css` with animations
   - Rewrote `HeaderContent.tsx` to use NavigationMenu
   - Fixed `useMemo` hook violation (was called inside `.map()` callback)
   - Lint passed with 0 errors

8. **Two-column layout**: User asked to change content to two-column layout. I implemented a simple 2x2 grid.

9. **Brainstorming session**: User said the simple 2-column was not meaningful enough. We went through visual brainstorming with a companion server:
   - **时光** (Timeline): Chose C - Category + Hover preview (like demo's articles)
   - **更多** (More): Chose A - Single column with descriptions
   - **文稿** (Posts): Chose B - Categories + recent posts
   - **手记** (Notes): Chose B - Topics/tags + latest note
   - **思考** (Thinking): Chose A - Pure link, no dropdown
   - **首页** (Home): Initially chose B (quick links panel), then rejected because "发现" data doesn't exist. Then chose A - Owner status panel with pages tags at bottom

10. **User approved final design and asked for implementation**: "可以" (approved the design summary)

11. **Current work**: Started implementing Phase 1. Read Activity.tsx, OwnerStatus.tsx, SiteOwnerAvatar.tsx for reusable hooks. Added `description` field to `IHeaderMenu` in config.ts. Was about to:
    - Add types to 时光/思考/更多 in config.ts
    - Add descriptions to 更多 subMenu items
    - Create DropdownContents.tsx with all 5 content components
    - Update HeaderContent.tsx with type-based dispatch

Key files modified so far:
- `apps/web/package.json` - @base-ui/react 1.2.0 → 1.3.0
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderContent.tsx` - major rewrite with NavigationMenu

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user wants to replicate the UI/UX design from a reference file (`<TMP_DIR>/b_2V3j51h3UWt-1773390512954/components/site-header.tsx`) into the Shiroi project's desktop header navigation menu. The reference design features a shared dropdown menu with direction-aware animations, smooth position transitions between triggers, size morphing, and rich per-section content layouts. After initial skeleton implementation, the user wants each navigation item to have a meaningful, differentiated dropdown layout with real data integration.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - `@base-ui/react` v1.3.0 `NavigationMenu` component (Root, List, Item, Trigger, Content, Link, Icon, Portal, Positioner, Popup, Viewport)
   - `NavigationMenu.Viewport` with `data-activation-direction` for direction-aware slide animations
   - CSS `@starting-style` for enter animations, `[data-ending-style]` for exit animations
   - Framer Motion (`motion/react`) `layoutId` for active nav indicator and icon animations
   - `render` prop pattern in base-ui for custom element composition (e.g., `render={<m.nav layout="size" />}`)
   - Spotlight radial gradient effect via `useMotionTemplate`
   - `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` dynamically injects `pageMeta` into Home's subMenu and `categories` into Post's subMenu from `aggregation.root()` API
   - Jotai atoms for activity/owner status state
   - TanStack Query for server state (activity polling, owner status)
   - Existing hooks: `useActivity()`, `useOwnerStatus()`, `useAggregationSelector()`, `useLiveQuery()`

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`<TMP_DIR>/b_2V3j51h3UWt-1773390512954/components/site-header.tsx`** (reference design)
     - Read to understand the target UI/UX pattern
     - Uses `Menu.createHandle<NavPayload>()` with shared `Menu.Root`, `openOnHover`, `Menu.Viewport` for direction-aware content transitions
     - Has differentiated content per section: HomeContent (grid), ArticlesContent (categories + hover preview), NotesContent (tag cloud), MomentsContent (icon list), MoreContent (descriptions)

   - **`<TMP_DIR>/b_2V3j51h3UWt-1773390512954/components/site-header.css`** (reference CSS)
     - Read for animation patterns
     - Key animations: `.nav-positioner` position transitions, `.nav-popup` size morphing + scale, `.nav-viewport` direction-aware `@keyframes slide-in-left/right`, `.nav-menu-content` `data-current`/`data-previous` transitions

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/config.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Defines `IHeaderMenu` interface and `headerMenuConfig` array
     - Added `description?: string` field to `IHeaderMenu` (partially done, more changes pending)
     - Current nav items: 首页(Home, subMenu:[]), 文稿(Post, subMenu:[]), 手记(Note, no subMenu), 时光(no type, subMenu with 4 items), 思考(no type, no subMenu), 更多(no type, subMenu with 4 items)
     - **Pending**: Add `type: 'Timeline'` to 时光, `type: 'Thinking'` to 思考, `type: 'More'` to 更多, add descriptions to 更多 subMenu items

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderContent.tsx`** (REWRITTEN)
     - Core component rewritten from FloatPopover-based menu to NavigationMenu
     - Current state uses `NavigationMenu.Root` with `render={<m.nav layout="size" />}` preserving spotlight effect
     - Items with subMenu → `NavigationMenu.Trigger` + `NavigationMenu.Content` (currently simple 2-column grid)

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDataConfigureProvider.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { createContext, use, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import {
     6→  useAggregationSelector,
     7→  useAppConfigSelector,
     8→} from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
     9→
    10→import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'
    11→import { headerMenuConfig as baseHeaderMenuConfig } from '../config'
    12→
    13→const HeaderMenuConfigContext = createContext({
    14→  config: baseHeaderMenuConfig,
    15→})
    16→
    17→export const useHeaderConfig = () => use(HeaderMenuConfigContext)
    18→const cloneHeaderMenuConfig = (items: IHeaderMenu[]): IHeaderMenu[] =>
    19→  items.map((item) => ({
    20→    ...item,
    21→    icon: item.icon,
    22→    titleKey: item.titleKey,
    23→    search: item.search ? { ...item.search } : undefined,
    24→    exclude: item.exclude ? [...item.exclude] : undefined,
    25→    subMenu: item.subMenu
    26→      ? cloneHeaderMenuConfig(item.subMenu as IHeaderMenu[])
    27→      : undefined,
    28→  }))
    29→
    30→export const HeaderDataConfigureProvider: Component = ({ children }) => {
    31→  const pageMeta = useAggregationSelector(
    32→    (aggregationData) => aggregationData.pageMeta,
    33→  )
    34→  const categories = useAggregationSelector(
    35→    (aggregationData) => aggregationData.categories,
    36→  )
    37→  const postListViewMode = useAppConfigSelector(
    38→    (appConfig) => appConfig.module?.posts?.mode,
    39→  )
    40→
    41→  const [headerMenuConfig, setHeaderMenuConfig] = useState(() =>
    42→    cloneHeaderMenuConfig(baseHeaderMenuConfig),
    43→  )
    44→
    45→  useEffect(() => {
    46→    if (!pageMeta) return
    47→    const nextMenuConfig = cloneHeaderMenuConfig(baseHeaderMenuConfig)
    48→    if (pageMeta) {
    49→      const homeIndex = nextMenuConfig.findIndex((item) => item.type === 'Home')
    50→      if (homeIndex !== -1) {
    51→        nextMenuConfig[homeIndex].subMenu = []
    52→        for (const page of pageMeta) {
    53→          nextMenuConfig[homeIndex].subMenu!.push({
    54→            path: `/${page.slug}`,
    55→            title: page.title,
    56→          })
    57→        }
    58→      }
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    if (categories?.length) {
    62→      const postIndex = nextMenuConfig.findIndex((item) => item.type === 'Post')
    63→      if (postIndex !== -1) {
    64→        nextMenuConfig[postIndex].subMenu = []
    65→        for (const category of categories) {
    66→          nextMenuConfig[postIndex].subMenu!.push({
    67→            path: `/categories/${category.slug}`,
    68→            title: category.name,
    69→          })
    70→        }
    71→      }
    72→    }
    73→
    74→    setHeaderMenuConfig(nextMenuConfig)
    75→  }, [categories, pageMeta])
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    setHeaderMenuConfig((config) => {
    79→      const postIndex = config.findIndex((item) => item.type === 'Post')
    80→
    81→      if (postIndex === -1 || !postListViewMode) {
    82→        return config
    83→      }
    84→
    85→      return config.map((item, index) => {
    86→        if (index !== postIndex) return item
    87→        return {
    88→          ...item,
    89→          search: {
    90→            ...item.search,
    91→            view_mode: postListViewMode,
    92→          },
    93→        }
    94→      })
    95→    })
    96→  }, [postListViewMode])
    97→
    98→  return (
    99→    <HeaderMenuConfigContext
   100→      value={useMemo(() => ({ config: headerMenuConfig }), [headerMenuConfig])}
   101→    >
   102→      {children}
   103→    </HeaderMenuConfigContext>
   104→  )
   105→}
   106→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    15→
    16→import { setActivityMediaInfo, setActivityProcessInfo } from '~/atoms/activity'

    19→import { ImpressionView } from '~/components/common/ImpressionTracker'

    29→
    30→const ActivityIconContext = createContext<{
    31→  appIcon: any
    32→  appDescription: any
    33→}>(null!)
    34→
    35→const CND_DOMAIN = 'https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/Innei/reporter-assets@main'
    36→const fetchJsonData = () =>
    37→  Promise.all([
    38→    fetch(`${CND_DOMAIN}/app-icon.json`).then((res) => res.json() as object),
    39→    fetch(`${CND_DOMAIN}/app-desc.json`).then((res) => res.json() as object),
    40→  ])
    41→export const Activity = () => {
    42→  const { data } = useQuery({
    43→    queryKey: ['app-icon', 'app-desc'],
    44→    queryFn: fetchJsonData,
    45→  })
    46→  if (!data) return null
    47→
    48→  const [appLabels, appDescription] = data
    49→  return (
    50→    <ActivityIconContext value={{ appIcon: appLabels, appDescription }}>
    51→      <ActivityIcon />
    52→    </ActivityIconContext>
    53→  )
    54→}
    55→
    56→const ActivityIcon = memo(() => {
    57→  const activityConfig = useAppConfigSelector(
    58→    (config) => config.module.activity,
    59→  )
    60→  const { enable = false, endpoint = '/fn/ps/update' } = activityConfig || {}
    61→  const activity = useActivity()
    62→
    63→  const isPageActive = usePageIsActive()
    64→  const { data } = useQuery({
    65→    queryKey: ['activity'],
    66→    queryFn: async () =>
    67→      await apiClient
    68→        .proxy(endpoint)
    69→        .post<{
    70→          processName: string
    71→          processInfo?: {
    72→            name: string
    73→            iconBase64?: string
    74→            iconUrl?: string

    84→        .then((res) => res)
    85→        .catch(() => ({
    86→          processName: '',
    87→          processInfo: undefined,
    88→          mediaInfo: undefined,
    89→        })),
    90→    refetchInterval: 1000 * 5 * 60,
    91→    refetchOnMount: 'always',
    92→    retry: false,
    93→    refetchOnReconnect: true,
    94→    refetchOnWindowFocus: 'always',
    95→    enabled: enable && isPageActive,
    96→    meta: {
    97→      persist: false,
    98→    },
    99→  })
   100→
   101→  useEffect(() => {
   102→    if (!data) return
   103→    if (data.mediaInfo && data.mediaInfo.title) {
   104→      setActivityMediaInfo(data.mediaInfo)
   105→    } else {
   106→      setActivityMediaInfo(null)

   108→    const nextProcessName = data.processInfo?.name || data.processName
   109→    setActivityProcessInfo(

   111→        ? {

   113→            iconUrl: data.processInfo?.iconUrl,
   114→            iconBase64: data.processInfo?.iconBase64,
   115→            description: data.processInfo?.description,
   116→          }
   117→        : null,
   118→    )
   119→  }, [data])
   120→
   121→  const ownerName = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.user.name)
   122→
   123→  const { process, media } = activity
   124→  const deferredProcess = useDeferredValue(process)

   126→  const processIcon = deferredProcess?.iconBase64 || deferredProcess?.iconUrl
   127→
   128→  const { appDescription, appIcon } = use(ActivityIconContext)

   131→
   132→  const memoProcessName = useMemo(
   133→    () => ({ processName: processName || '', icon: processIcon }),
   134→    [processIcon, processName],
   135→  )
   136→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   137→  const cMusicProps = useMemo(() => {
   138→    const size = isMobile ? 32 : 24
   139→    if (!media?.processName) {
   140→      return { processName: 'cmusic', size }
   141→    }
   142→    return { processName: media?.processName || '', size }
   143→  }, [media, isMobile])
   144→
   145→  const mediaVerb = media?.verb || '听'
   146→  const processVerb = process?.verb || '使用'
   147→
   148→  const hasProcessIcon =
   149→    !!processName && !!(processIcon || appIcon?.[processName])
   150→  const shouldShowProcess = isPageActive && hasProcessIcon
   151→  const shouldShowMedia = !!(
   152→    media &&
   153→    media.title &&
   154→    media.artist &&
   155→    hasProcessIcon
   156→  )
   157→
   158→  return (
   159→    <>
   160→      {shouldShowMedia && (
   161→        <m.div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 z-[11] flex items-center lg:left-auto lg:right-[-55px] lg:translate-y-1">
   162→          <FloatPopover
   163→            TriggerComponent={TriggerComponent}
   164→            strategy="fixed"
   165→            triggerComponentProps={cMusicProps}
   166→            type="tooltip"
   167→          >
   168→            <p className="text-[13px]">
   169→              {ownerName} 正在
   170→              {media.processName
   171→                ? `使用 ${media.processName} ${mediaVerb}`
   172→                : mediaVerb}
   173→              ：
   174→            </p>
   175→            <p>
   176→              <span className="font-bold">
   177→                {media.title} - {media.artist}
   178→              </span>
   179→              <span className="ml-4">
   180→                {media.duration ? formatDuration(media.duration) : ''}
   181→              </span>
   182→            </p>
   183→          </FloatPopover>
   184→        </m.div>
   185→      )}
   186→      {isPageActive && (
   187→        <AnimatePresence>
   188→          {shouldShowProcess && (
   189→            <m.div
   190→              className="pointer-events-auto absolute inset-y-0 right-3 z-10 flex items-center overflow-hidden lg:right-[-30px]"
   191→              key={processName}
   192→              transition={softBouncePreset}
   193→              animate={{
   194→                opacity: 1,
   195→                x: 0,
   196→                y: 0,
   197→              }}
   198→              exit={{
   199→                opacity: 0,
   200→                x: -10,
   201→              }}
   202→              initial={{
   203→                opacity: 0.0001,
   204→                y: 15,
   205→              }}
   206→            >
   207→              <FloatPopover
   208→                TriggerComponent={TriggerComponent}
   209→                strategy="fixed"
   210→                triggerComponentProps={memoProcessName}
   211→                type="tooltip"
   212→              >
   213→                <ImpressionView
   214→                  action={TrackerAction.Impression}
   215→                  trackerMessage="Activity"
   216→                >
   217→                  <p className="text-[13px]">
   218→                    {ownerName} 正在{processVerb}：
   219→                  </p>
   220→                  <p>
   221→                    <span className="font-bold">{processName}</span>
   222→                    <span className="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">
   223→                      {renderDescription ? ` ${renderDescription}` : ''}
   224→                    </span>
   225→                  </p>
   226→                </ImpressionView>
   227→              </FloatPopover>
   228→            </m.div>
   229→          )}
   230→        </AnimatePresence>
   231→      )}
   232→    </>
   233→  )
   234→})
   235→ActivityIcon.displayName = 'Activity'
   236→
   237→const ErrorFallback = `data:image/png;base64,`
   238→const TriggerComponent = memo<{
   239→  processName: string
   240→  icon?: string
   241→  className?: string
   242→  size?: number
   243→}>(({ processName, icon, className: classNameProp, size = 36 }) => {
   244→  const { appIcon } = use(ActivityIconContext)
   245→  const isBuiltIn = !!appIcon[processName]
   246→
   247→  const src =
   248→    !isBuiltIn && icon
   249→      ? icon
   250→      : isBuiltIn
   251→        ? `${CND_DOMAIN}/apps/${appIcon[processName]}.png`
   252→        : ''
   253→
   254→  const className = clsx(
   255→    'pointer-events-none select-none',
   256→    {
   257→      'rounded-md': !isBuiltIn,
   258→    },
   259→    classNameProp,
   260→  )
   261→  const [error, setError] = React.useState(false)
   262→
   263→  if (!src) return null
   264→
   265→  return (
   266→    <img
   267→      alt={processName}
   268→      className={className}
   269→      fetchPriority="low"
   270→      height={size}
   271→      src={error ? ErrorFallback : src}
   272→      width={size}
   273→      onError={() => setError(true)}
   274→    />
   275→  )
   276→})
   277→
   278→TriggerComponent.displayName = 'ActivityIcon'
   279→
   280→const formatDuration = (duration: number) => {
   281→  duration = Math.floor(duration)
   282→  const minutes = Math.floor(duration / 60)
   283→  const seconds = duration % 60
   284→  return `${minutes}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`
   285→}
   286→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     7→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     8→import { setOwnerStatus, useOwnerStatus } from '~/atoms/hooks/status'
     9→import type { OwnerStatus as TOwnerStatus } from '~/atoms/status'
    10→import { StyledButton } from '~/components/ui/button'

    27→export const OwnerStatus = () => {

    33→    refetchOnWindowFocus: 'always',

    35→    enabled: pageIsActive,
    36→    meta: {
    37→      persist: false,
    38→    },
    39→  })
    40→
    41→  useEffect(() => {
    42→    if (statusLoading) return
    43→    if (!statusFromRequest) {
    44→      setOwnerStatus(null)
    45→    } else setOwnerStatus({ ...statusFromRequest })
    46→  }, [statusFromRequest, statusLoading])
    47→
    48→  const ownerStatus = useOwnerStatus()
    49→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    50→
    51→  const [mouseEnter, setMouseEnter] = useState(false)
    52→  const { present } = useModalStack()

    55→      role={isLogged ? 'button' : 'img'}

    59→        isLogged && mouseEnter && !ownerStatus
    60→          ? 'size-6 rounded-full bg-neutral-1'
    61→          : '',
    62→        isLogged && mouseEnter && 'cursor-pointer',

    64→      onClick={

    75→      onMouseEnter={() => {

    77→      }}
    78→      onMouseLeave={() => {
    79→        setMouseEnter(false)
    80→      }}

   100→        {ownerStatus && (

   117→  )
   118→}
   119→const formatDatetime = (ts: number) => {
   120→  const date = new Date(ts)
   121→  // 如果在明天
   122→  if (new Date().getDate() !== date.getDate()) {
   123→    return `${date.toLocaleDateString()} ${date.toLocaleTimeString()}`
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return date.toLocaleTimeString()
   127→}
   128→
   129→const SettingStatusModalContent = () => {
   130→  const t = useTranslations('common')

   139→          validator: (value: string) => !!value,

   141→        },
   142→      ],
   143→    },
   144→    {
   145→      name: 'desc',
   146→      placeholder: t('status_desc_placeholder'),
   147→      defaultValue: ownerStatus?.desc,
   148→      rules: [
   149→        {
   150→          validator: (value: string) => !!value,
   151→          message: t('status_desc_required'),
   152→        },
   153→      ],
   154→    },
   155→    {

   157→      placeholder: t('status_duration_placeholder'),
   158→      type: 'number',
   159→      defaultValue: 1,
   160→      rules: [

   165→      ],

   175→

   198→    toast.success(t('status_set_success'))
   199→
   200→    dismiss()
   201→  }, [dismiss, timeType, t])
   202→
   203→  const handleReset = useCallback(async () => {

   220→          headless

   232→            </div>
   233→          }
   234→        >
   235→          <EmojiPicker
   236→            onEmojiSelect={(val) => {
   237→              formRef.current?.setValue('emoji', val)
   238→            }}
   239→          />
   240→        </FloatPopover>
   241→      </div>
   242→      {inputs.slice(1, -1).map((input) => (
   243→        <FormInput key={input.name} {...input} />
   244→      ))}
   245→
   246→      <div className="mb-4 flex gap-2">
   247→        <FormInput {...(inputs.at(-1) as InputFieldProps)} />
   248→        <Select
   249→          value={timeType}
   250→          values={[
   251→            { label: t('time_minute'), value: 'm' },
   252→            { label: t('time_second'), value: 's' },
   253→            { label: t('time_hour'), value: 'h' },
   254→            { label: t('time_day'), value: 'd' },
   255→          ]}
   256→          onChange={setTimeType}
   257→        />
   258→      </div>
   259→
   260→      <div className="center flex w-full gap-2">
   261→        <StyledButton
   262→          className="rounded-md"
   263→          isLoading={isLoading}

   265→          onClick={handleReset}

   269→        <StyledButton isLoading={isLoading} type="submit" variant="primary">
   270→          {t('actions_submit')}
   271→        </StyledButton>
   272→      </div>
   273→    </Form>
   274→  )
   275→}
```

```tsx
'use client'

import type { FC } from 'react'

import { NavigationMenu } from '@base-ui/react/navigation-menu'
import Image from 'next/image'
import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import { useDeferredValue } from 'react'

import { useActivity } from '~/atoms/hooks/activity'
import { useOwnerStatus } from '~/atoms/hooks/status'
import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'

import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'

interface DropdownProps {
  section: IHeaderMenu
}

// === Home: Owner status + Pages tag pills ===
export const HomeDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const avatar = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.user.avatar)
  const ownerName = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.user.name)
  const ownerStatus = useOwnerStatus()
  const activity = useActivity()
  const deferredProcess = useDeferredValue(activity.process)
  const pages = section.subMenu || []

  return (
    <div className="w-[260px] p-3">
      <NavigationMenu.Link
        closeOnClick
        className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg p-1.5 transition hover:bg-accent/5"
        render={<Link href="/" />}
      >
        {avatar && (
          <Image
            alt={ownerName}
            className="shrink-0 rounded-full ring-1 ring-neutral-200 dark:ring-neutral-700"
            height={36}
            src={avatar}
            width={36}
          />
        )}
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <div className="text-sm font-medium">{ownerName}</div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
            {ownerStatus ? (
              <>
                <span>{ownerStatus.emoji}</span>
                <span className="truncate">{ownerStatus.desc}</span>
              </>
            ) : deferredProcess?.name ? (
              <>
                <span className="inline-block size-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
                <span className="truncate">
                  正在使用 {deferredProcess.name}
                </span>
              </>
            ) : (
              <span className="text-neutral-400">在线</span>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </NavigationMenu.Link>

      {pages.length > 0 && (
        <div className="mt-2.5 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2.5 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {pages.map((page) => (
              <NavigationMenu.Link
                key={page.path}
                closeOnClick
                className="rounded-full bg-neutral-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-[11px] text-neutral-600 transition hover:bg-accent/10 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-400"
                render={<Link href={page.path} />}
              >
                {page.title}
              </NavigationMenu.Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// === Post: Categories with counts ===
export const PostsDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const categories = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.categories)

  return (
    <div className="w-[280px] p-3">
      <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
        分类
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        {categories?.map((cat) => (
          <NavigationMenu.Link
            key={cat.slug}
            closeOnClick
            className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
            render={<Link href={`/categories/${cat.slug}`} />}
          >
            <span>{cat.name}</span>
            <span className="text-[11px] text-neutral-400">{cat.count}</span>
          </NavigationMenu.Link>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="mt-2 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
        <NavigationMenu.Link
          closeOnClick
          className="flex items-center justify-between text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
          render={<Link href={section.path} onClick={section.do} />}
        >
          <span>查看全部文稿</span>
          <span>
            {categories?.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.count, 0) ?? 0} 篇
          </span>
        </NavigationMenu.Link>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// === Notes: Placeholder ===
export const NotesDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  return (
    <div className="w-[240px] p-3">
      <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
        专栏
      </div>
      <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
        {/* Phase 2: topics from API */}
      </div>
      <div className="border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
        <NavigationMenu.Link
          closeOnClick
          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
          render={<Link href={section.path} />}
        >
          查看全部手记
        </NavigationMenu.Link>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// === Timeline: Category list ===
export const TimelineDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const items = section.subMenu || []

  return (
    <div className="w-[220px] p-2.5">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        {items.map((item) => {
          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
          return (
            <NavigationMenu.Link
              key={item.path}
              closeOnClick
              className="flex items-center gap-2.5 rounded-md px-2.5 py-2 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
              render={
                isExternal ? (
                  <a
                    href={item.path}
                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
                    target="_blank"
                  />
                ) : (
                  <Link href={item.path} />
                )
              }
            >
              {!!item.icon && (
                <span className="flex w-4 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm opacity-70">
                  {item.icon}
                </span>
              )}
              <span>
                {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
              </span>
            </NavigationMenu.Link>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// === More: Single column with descriptions ===
export const MoreDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const items = section.subMenu || []

  return (
    <div className="w-[220px] p-2">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        {items.map((item) => {
          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
          return (
            <NavigationMenu.Link
              key={item.path}
              closeOnClick
              className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2.5 text-left transition hover:bg-accent/5"
              render={
                isExternal ? (
                  <a
                    href={item.path}
                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
                    target="_blank"
                  />
                ) : (
                  <Link href={item.path} />
                )
              }
            >
              {!!item.icon && (
                <span className="flex w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-base opacity-70">
                  {item.icon}
                </span>
              )}
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                <div className="text-[13px]">
                  {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
                </div>
                {item.description && (
                  <div className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
                    {item.description}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </NavigationMenu.Link>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export const dropdownTypeMap: Record<string, FC<DropdownProps>> = {
  Home: HomeDropdownContent,
  Post: PostsDropdownContent,
  Note: NotesDropdownContent,
  Timeline: TimelineDropdownContent,
  More: MoreDropdownContent,
}

```

```text
    69→      queryFn: async () => {
    70→        const data = await apiClient.post.getPost(id)
    71→
    72→        const dto = {
    73→          ...data.$serialized,
    74→          relatedId: data.related?.map((i) => i.id) || [],
    75→        } as PostDto
    76→
    77→        return dto
    78→      },

   123→        'related',
   124→        'modified',
   125→        'category',
   126→      ] as (keyof PostModel)[]
   127→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   128→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   129→        delete nextData[key]
   130→      }
   131→      return apiClient.post.proxy.post<{
   132→        id: string
   133→      }>({
   134→        data: nextData,
   135→      })
   136→    },
   137→    onSuccess: () => {
   138→      toast.success('创建成功')
   139→      resetAutoSaver('post')
   140→    },
   141→  })
   142→}
   143→
   144→export const useUpdatePost = () => {
   145→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
   146→  return useMutation({
   147→    mutationFn: (data: PostDto) => {
   148→      const { id } = data
   149→      const readonlyKeys = [
   150→        'id',
   151→        'related',
   152→        'modified',
   153→        'category',
   154→      ] as (keyof PostModel)[]
   155→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   156→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   157→        delete nextData[key]
   158→      }
   159→      return apiClient.post.proxy(id).put<{
   160→        id: string
   161→      }>({
   162→        data: nextData,
   163→      })

   165→    onSuccess: ({ id }) => {
   166→      toast.success('更新成功')
   167→      resetAutoSaver('post', id)
```

```text
    50→    defineQuery({
    51→      queryKey: ['noteAdmin', 'allTopic'],
    52→      queryFn: async () => {
    53→        const data = await apiClient.topic.getAll()
    54→
    55→        return data.$serialized.data
    56→      },
    57→    }),
    58→
    59→  getNote: (id: string) =>
    60→    defineQuery({
    61→      queryKey: ['noteAdmin', 'getNote', id],
    62→      queryFn: async () => {
    63→        const data = await apiClient.note.getNoteById(id)
    64→
    65→        const dto = data.$serialized as NoteDto
    66→
    67→        return dto
    68→      },
    69→    }),
    70→}
    71→
    72→export const useCreateNote = () => {
    73→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
    74→  return useMutation({
    75→    mutationFn: (data: NoteDto) => {
    76→      const readonlyKeys = [
    77→        'id',
    78→        'nid',
    79→        'modified',
    80→        'topic',
    81→      ] as (keyof NoteModel)[]
    82→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
    83→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
    84→        delete nextData[key]
    85→      }
    86→      return apiClient.note.proxy.post<{
    87→        id: string
    88→      }>({
    89→        data: nextData,
    90→      })
    91→    },
    92→    onSuccess: () => {
    93→      toast.success('创建成功')
    94→      resetAutoSaver('note')
    95→    },
    96→  })
    97→}
    98→
    99→export const useUpdateNote = () => {
   100→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
   101→  return useMutation({
   102→    mutationFn: (data: NoteDto) => {
   103→      const { id } = data
   104→      const readonlyKeys = [
   105→        'id',
   106→        'nid',
   107→        'modified',
   108→        'topic',
   109→      ] as (keyof NoteModel)[]
   110→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   111→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   112→        delete nextData[key]
   113→      }
   114→      return apiClient.note.proxy(id).put<{
   115→        id: string
   116→      }>({
   117→        data: nextData,
   118→      })
   119→    },
   120→    onSuccess: ({ id }) => {
   121→      toast.success('更新成功')
   122→      resetAutoSaver('note', id)
   123→    },
   124→  })
   125→}
   126→
```

```text
    23→
    24→enum ArticleType {
    25→  Post,
    26→  Note,
    27→}
    28→type MapType = {
    29→  title: string
    30→  meta: string[]
    31→  date: Date
    32→  href: string
    33→
    34→  type: ArticleType
    35→  id: string
    36→  important?: boolean
    37→}
    38→
    39→const useJumpTo = () => {
    40→  useEffect(() => {
    41→    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
    42→      const jumpToId = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('selectId')
    43→
    44→      if (!jumpToId) return
    45→
    46→      const target = document.querySelector(
    47→        `[data-id="${jumpToId}"]`,
    48→      ) as HTMLElement
    49→
    50→      if (!target) return
    51→
    52→      const $a = target.querySelector('a')
    53→
    54→      $a?.classList.add('no-shadow')
    55→      springScrollToElement(target, -500).then(() => {
    56→        target.animate(
    57→          [
    58→            {
    59→              backgroundColor: getComputedStyle(
    60→                document.documentElement,
    61→              ).getPropertyValue('accent-color'),
    62→            },
    63→            {
    64→              backgroundColor: 'transparent',
    65→            },
    66→          ],
    67→          {
    68→            duration: 1500,
    69→            easing: 'ease-in-out',
    70→            fill: 'both',
    71→            iterations: 1,
    72→          },
    73→        ).onfinish = () => $a?.classList.remove('no-shadow')
    74→      })
    75→
    76→      // wait for user focus
    77→    }, 100)
    78→
    79→    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
    80→  }, [])
    81→}
    82→
    83→export default function TimelinePage() {
    84→  const t = useTranslations('home')
    85→  const locale = useLocale()
    86→  const search = useSearchParams()
    87→
    88→  const year = search.get('year')
    89→  const type = search.get('type') as 'post' | 'note'
    90→  const nextType = {
    91→    post: TimelineType.Post,
    92→    note: TimelineType.Note,
    93→  }[type]
    94→
    95→  const { data: initialData } = useQuery<TimelineData>({
    96→    queryKey: ['timeline'],
    97→    enabled: false,
    98→  })
    99→  const { data, refetch } = useQuery<TimelineData>({
   100→    queryKey: ['timeline', nextType, year, locale],
   101→    initialData,
   102→    queryFn: async ({ queryKey }) => {
   103→      const [, nextType, year] = queryKey as [string, TimelineType, string]
   104→      return await apiClient.aggregate
   105→        .getTimeline({
   106→          type: nextType,
   107→          year: +(year || 0) || undefined,
   108→        })
   109→        .then((res) => res.data)
   110→    },
   111→  })
   112→
   113→  useEffect(() => {
   114→    refetch()
   115→  }, [nextType])
   116→
   117→  useJumpTo()
   118→
   119→  if (!data) return null
   120→
   121→  const memory = search.get('bookmark') || search.get('memory')
   122→
   123→  const title = !memory ? t('timeline_page_title') : t('timeline_memory')
   124→
   125→  const { posts = [], notes = [] } = data
   126→  const sortedMap = new Map<number, MapType[]>()
   127→
   128→  if (!memory) {
   129→    posts.forEach((post) => {
   130→      const date = new Date(post.created)
   131→      const year = date.getFullYear()
   132→      const data: MapType = {
   133→        title: post.title,
   134→        meta: [post.category.name, t('timeline_post')],
   135→        date,
   136→        href: `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`,
   137→
   138→        type: ArticleType.Post,
   139→        id: post.id,
   140→      }
   141→      sortedMap.set(
   142→        year,
   143→        sortedMap.get(year) ? sortedMap.get(year)!.concat(data) : [data],
   144→      )
   145→    })
   146→  }
   147→
   148→  notes
   149→    .filter((n) => (memory ? n.bookmark : true))
   150→    .forEach((note) => {
   151→      const date = new Date(note.created)
   152→      const year = date.getFullYear()
   153→      const data: MapType = {
   154→        title: note.title,
   155→        meta: [
   156→          note.mood ? t('timeline_mood', { mood: note.mood }) : undefined,
   157→          note.weather
   158→            ? t('timeline_weather', { weather: note.weather })
   159→            : undefined,
   160→          t('timeline_note'),
   161→        ].filter(Boolean) as string[],
   162→        date,
   163→        href: `/notes/${note.nid}`,
   164→
   165→        type: ArticleType.Note,
   166→        id: note.id,
   167→        important: note.bookmark,
   168→      }
   169→
   170→      sortedMap.set(
   171→        year,
   172→        sortedMap.get(year) ? sortedMap.get(year)!.concat(data) : [data],
   173→      )
   174→    })
   175→
   176→  sortedMap.forEach((val, key) => {
   177→    sortedMap.set(
   178→      key,
   179→      val.sort((a, b) => b.date.getTime() - a.date.getTime()),
   180→    )
   181→  })
   182→
   183→  const sortedArr = Array.from(sortedMap)
   184→  const postCount = sortedArr
   185→    .flat(2)
   186→    .filter((i) => typeof i === 'object').length
   187→
   188→  const subtitle = `${t('timeline_total')}${postCount}${t('timeline_posts')}${!memory ? t('timeline_keep_going') : t('timeline_look_back')}`
   189→
   190→  return (
   191→    <NormalContainer>
   192→      <header className="prose prose-p:my-2">
   193→        <h1>{title}</h1>
   194→        <h3>{subtitle}</h3>
   195→
   196→        {!memory && (
   197→          <>
   198→            <Divider className="my-8 w-[80px]" />
   199→            <TimelineProgress />
   200→            <p>{t('timeline_live_present')}</p>
   201→          </>
   202→        )}
   203→      </header>
   204→
   205→      <main className="mt-10 text-neutral-10/80" key={type}>
   206→        {sortedArr.reverse().map(([year, value]) => (
   207→          <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView className="my-4" key={year}>
   208→            <m.h4
   209→              className={clsx(
   210→                'relative mb-4 ml-3 text-lg font-medium',
   211→                'rounded-md before:content-auto before:absolute before:inset-y-[4px] before:-left-3 before:w-[2px] before:bg-accent',
   212→              )}
   213→            >
   214→              {year}
   215→              <small className="ml-2">({value.length})</small>
   216→            </m.h4>
   217→            <TimelineList>
   218→              {value.map((item) => (
   219→                <Item item={item} key={item.id} />
   220→              ))}
   221→            </TimelineList>
   222→          </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   223→        ))}
   224→      </main>
   225→      <BackToTopFAB />
   226→    </NormalContainer>
   227→  )
   228→}
   229→
   230→const Item = memo<{
   231→  item: MapType
   232→}>(({ item }) => {
   233→  const router = useRouter()
   234→
   235→  return (
   236→    <li
   237→      className="flex items-center justify-between"
   238→      data-id={item.id}
   239→      key={item.id}
   240→    >
   241→      <span className="flex min-w-0 shrink items-center">
   242→        <span className="mr-2 inline-block w-12 tabular-nums">
   243→          {Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-us', {
   244→            month: '2-digit',
   245→            day: '2-digit',
   246→          }).format(item.date)}
   247→        </span>
   248→        <PeekLink className="min-w-0 truncate leading-6" href={item.href}>
   249→          <span className="min-w-0 truncate">{item.title}</span>
   250→        </PeekLink>
   251→        {item.important && (
   252→          <SolidBookmark
   253→            className="ml-2 cursor-pointer text-red-500"
   254→            onClick={() => {
   255→              const url = new URL(window.location.href)
   256→              url.searchParams.set('memory', 'true')
   257→              router.push(url.href)
   258→            }}
   259→          />
   260→        )}
   261→      </span>
   262→      <span className="hidden text-sm lg:inline">
   263→        {item.meta.map((m, i) => (i === 0 ? m : `/${m}`))}
   264→      </span>
   265→    </li>
   266→  )
   267→})
   268→Item.displayName = 'Item'
   269→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
import { dehydrate } from '@tanstack/react-query'

import { QueryHydrate } from '~/components/common/QueryHydrate'
import { isShallowEqualArray } from '~/lib/lodash'
import { getQueryClient } from '~/lib/query-client.server'
import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
import { definePrerenderPage, requestErrorHandler } from '~/lib/request.server'

import { ActivityScreen } from './components/ActivityScreen'
import { Hero } from './components/Hero'
import { HomePageTimeLine } from './components/HomePageTimeLine'
import { Windsock } from './components/Windsock'
import { getQueryKey } from './query'

export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'

export default definePrerenderPage<{ locale: string }>()({
  async fetcher({ locale }) {
    const queryClient = getQueryClient()
    const queryKey = getQueryKey(locale)

    try {
      return await queryClient.fetchQuery({
        queryKey,
        queryFn: async () => (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized,
      })
    } catch (error) {
      return requestErrorHandler(error)
    }
  },
  async Component(props) {
    const queryClient = getQueryClient()
    const queryKey = getQueryKey(props.params.locale)

    const dehydrateState = dehydrate(queryClient, {
      shouldDehydrateQuery(query) {
        return isShallowEqualArray(query.queryKey as any, queryKey)
      },
    })

    return (
      <QueryHydrate state={dehydrateState}>
        <Hero />
        <ActivityScreen />
        <HomePageTimeLine />
        <Windsock />
        {props.children}
      </QueryHydrate>
    )
  },
})
```

```text
import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
import { defineQuery } from '~/queries/helper'

export const getTopicQuery = (topicSlug: string, locale?: string) =>
  defineQuery({
    queryKey: ['topic', topicSlug, locale],
    queryFn: async ({ queryKey }) => {
```

 `./apps/web/src/queries/definition/note.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  NoteModel,
     3→  NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload,
     4→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     5→import { useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     6→
     7→import { useResetAutoSaverData } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/BaseWritingProvider'
     8→import { cloneDeep } from '~/lib/lodash'
     9→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    10→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    11→import type { NoteDto } from '~/models/writing'
    12→
    13→import { defineQuery } from '../helper'
    14→
    15→const LATEST_KEY = 'latest'
    16→export const note = {
    17→  byNid: (nid: string, password?: string | null, lang?: string) =>
    18→    defineQuery({
    19→      queryKey: ['note', nid, lang],
    20→
    21→      queryFn: async ({ queryKey }) => {
    22→        const [, id, lang] = queryKey as [string, string, string | undefined]
    23→
    24→        if (id === LATEST_KEY) {
    25→          return (await apiClient.note.getLatest()).$serialized
    26→        }
    27→        const data = await apiClient.note.getNoteByNid(Number(id), {
    28→          password: password || undefined,
    29→          lang: lang || undefined,
    30→          prefer: 'lexical',
    31→        })
    32→
    33→        return data.$serialized as NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload
    34→      },
    35→    }),
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const noteAdmin = {
    39→  paginate: (page?: number) =>
    40→    defineQuery({
    41→      queryKey: ['noteAdmin', 'paginate', page],
    42→      queryFn: async ({ pageParam }: any) => {
    43→        const data = await apiClient.note.getList(pageParam ?? page)
    44→
    45→        return data.$serialized
    46→      },
    47→    }),
    48→
    49→  allTopic: () =>
    50→    defineQuery({
    51→      queryKey: ['noteAdmin', 'allTopic'],
    52→      queryFn: async () => {
    53→        const data = await apiClient.topic.getAll()
    54→
    55→        return data.$serialized.data
    56→      },
    57→    }),
    58→
    59→  getNote: (id: string) =>
    60→    defineQuery({
    61→      queryKey: ['noteAdmin', 'getNote', id],
    62→      queryFn: async () => {
    63→        const data = await apiClient.note.getNoteById(id)
    64→
    65→        const dto = data.$serialized as NoteDto
    66→
    67→        return dto
    68→      },
    69→    }),
    70→}
    71→
    72→export const useCreateNote = () => {
    73→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
    74→  return useMutation({
    75→    mutationFn: (data: NoteDto) => {
    76→      const readonlyKeys = [
    77→        'id',
    78→        'nid',
    79→        'modified',
    80→        'topic',
    81→      ] as (keyof NoteModel)[]
    82→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
    83→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
    84→        delete nextData[key]
    85→      }
    86→      return apiClient.note.proxy.post<{
    87→        id: string
    88→      }>({
    89→        data: nextData,
    90→      })
    91→    },
    92→    onSuccess: () => {
    93→      toast.success('创建成功')
    94→      resetAutoSaver('note')
    95→    },
    96→  })
    97→}
    98→
    99→export const useUpdateNote = () => {
   100→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
   101→  return useMutation({
   102→    mutationFn: (data: NoteDto) => {
   103→      const { id } = data
   104→      const readonlyKeys = [
   105→        'id',
   106→        'nid',
   107→        'modified',
   108→        'topic',
   109→      ] as (keyof NoteModel)[]
   110→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   111→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   112→        delete nextData[key]
   113→      }
   114→      return apiClient.note.proxy(id).put<{
   115→        id: string
   116→      }>({
   117→        data: nextData,
   118→      })
   119→    },
   120→    onSuccess: ({ id }) => {
   121→      toast.success('更新成功')
   122→      resetAutoSaver('note', id)
   123→    },
   124→  })
   125→}
   126→
```

```text
   146→  return useMutation({
   147→    mutationFn: (data: PostDto) => {
   148→      const { id } = data
   149→      const readonlyKeys = [
   150→        'id',
   151→        'related',
   152→        'modified',
   153→        'category',
   154→      ] as (keyof PostModel)[]
   155→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   156→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   157→        delete nextData[key]
   158→      }
   159→      return apiClient.post.proxy(id).put<{
   160→        id: string
   161→      }>({
   162→        data: nextData,
   163→      })
   164→    },
   165→    onSuccess: ({ id }) => {
   166→      toast.success('更新成功')
   167→      resetAutoSaver('post', id)
   168→    },
   169→  })
   170→}
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useFormatter } from 'next-intl'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { Fragment, useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useRelativeTime } from '~/hooks/common/use-relative-time'
     8→
     9→export const RelativeTime: FC<{
    10→  date: string | Date
    11→  displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay?: number
    12→}> = (props) => {
    13→  const { displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay = 29 } = props
    14→  const { relativeTimeFromNow } = useRelativeTime()
    15→  const format = useFormatter()
    16→
    17→  const formatTime = useCallback(
    18→    (date: string | Date, relativeBeforeDay?: number) => {
    19→      const dateObj = new Date(date)
    20→      const daysDiff = Math.abs(
    21→        Math.floor((dateObj.getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)),
    22→      )
    23→      if (relativeBeforeDay && daysDiff > relativeBeforeDay) {
    24→        return format.dateTime(dateObj, {
    25→          year: 'numeric',
    26→          month: 'long',
    27→          day: 'numeric',
    28→          weekday: 'long',
    29→        })
    30→      }
    31→      return relativeTimeFromNow(date)
    32→    },
    33→    [format, relativeTimeFromNow],
    34→  )
    35→
    36→  const [relative, setRelative] = useState<string>('')
    37→
    38→  useEffect(() => {
    39→    setRelative(formatTime(props.date, displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay))
    40→    let timer: any = setInterval(() => {
    41→      setRelative(formatTime(props.date, displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay))
    42→    }, 1000)
    43→
    44→    return () => {
    45→      timer = clearInterval(timer)
    46→    }
    47→  }, [props.date, displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay, formatTime])
    48→
    49→  return <Fragment>{relative}</Fragment>
    50→}
    51→
```

```tsx
'use client'

import type { AggregateTop } from '@mx-space/api-client'
import { NavigationMenu } from '@base-ui/react/navigation-menu'
import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
import Image from 'next/image'
import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
import type { FC } from 'react'
import { useDeferredValue, useState } from 'react'

import { useActivity } from '~/atoms/hooks/activity'
import { useOwnerStatus } from '~/atoms/hooks/status'
import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time/RelativeTime'
import { Link } from '~/i18n/navigation'
import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'

import type { IHeaderMenu } from '../config'

interface DropdownProps {
  section: IHeaderMenu
}

// === Home: Owner status + Pages tag pills ===
export const HomeDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const avatar = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.user.avatar)
  const ownerName = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.user.name)
  const ownerStatus = useOwnerStatus()
  const activity = useActivity()
  const deferredProcess = useDeferredValue(activity.process)
  const pages = section.subMenu || []

  return (
    <div className="w-[260px] p-3">
      <NavigationMenu.Link
        closeOnClick
        className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg p-1.5 transition hover:bg-accent/5"
        render={<Link href="/" />}
      >
        {avatar && (
          <Image
            alt={ownerName}
            className="shrink-0 rounded-full ring-1 ring-neutral-200 dark:ring-neutral-700"
            height={36}
            src={avatar}
            width={36}
          />
        )}
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <div className="text-sm font-medium">{ownerName}</div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
            {ownerStatus ? (
              <>
                <span>{ownerStatus.emoji}</span>
                <span className="truncate">{ownerStatus.desc}</span>
              </>
            ) : deferredProcess?.name ? (
              <>
                <span className="inline-block size-1.5 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
                <span className="truncate">
                  正在使用 {deferredProcess.name}
                </span>
              </>
            ) : (
              <span className="text-neutral-400">在线</span>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </NavigationMenu.Link>

      {pages.length > 0 && (
        <div className="mt-2.5 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2.5 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {pages.map((page) => (
              <NavigationMenu.Link
                closeOnClick
                className="rounded-full bg-neutral-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-[11px] text-neutral-600 transition hover:bg-accent/10 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-400"
                key={page.path}
                render={<Link href={page.path} />}
              >
                {page.title}
              </NavigationMenu.Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// === Post: Categories with counts + hover preview ===
export const PostsDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const categories = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.categories)
  const [hoveredSlug, setHoveredSlug] = useState<string | null>(
    () => categories?.[0]?.slug ?? null,
  )

  const { data: categoryDetail } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['nav-category-posts', hoveredSlug],
    queryFn: () => apiClient.category.getCategoryByIdOrSlug(hoveredSlug!),
    enabled: !!hoveredSlug,
    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
  })

  const recentPosts = categoryDetail?.children?.slice(0, 4)

  return (
    <div className="w-[380px] p-3">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-[140px_1fr] gap-3">
        {/* Left: Categories */}
        <div>
          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
            分类
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
            {categories?.map((cat) => (
              <NavigationMenu.Link
                closeOnClick
                className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[13px] transition data-[hovered]:bg-accent/5 data-[hovered]:text-accent"
                data-hovered={hoveredSlug === cat.slug ? '' : undefined}
                key={cat.slug}
                render={<Link href={`/categories/${cat.slug}`} />}
                onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredSlug(cat.slug)}
              >
                <span>{cat.name}</span>
                <span className="text-[11px] text-neutral-400">
                  {cat.count}
                </span>
              </NavigationMenu.Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right: Recent posts */}
        <div>
          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
            {categories?.find((c) => c.slug === hoveredSlug)?.name ?? '最近'}
            {' · 最近'}
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
            {recentPosts?.map((post) => (
              <NavigationMenu.Link
                closeOnClick
                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
                key={post.id}
                render={
                  <Link
                    href={`/posts/${hoveredSlug}/${post.slug}`}
                  />
                }
              >
                <div className="text-[13px] leading-snug">{post.title}</div>
                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
                  <RelativeTime date={post.created} />
                </div>
              </NavigationMenu.Link>
            ))}
            {!recentPosts?.length && (
              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
                ...
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="mt-2 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
        <NavigationMenu.Link
          closeOnClick
          className="flex items-center justify-between text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
          render={<Link href={section.path} onClick={section.do} />}
        >
          <span>查看全部文稿</span>
          <span>
            {categories?.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.count, 0) ?? 0} 篇
          </span>
        </NavigationMenu.Link>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// === Notes: Topics + latest note ===
export const NotesDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const latestNoteId = useAggregationSelector((data) => data.latestNoteId)

  const { data: topics } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['nav-topics'],
    queryFn: async () => {
      const data = await apiClient.topic.getAll()
      return data.$serialized.data
    },
    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10,
  })

  return (
    <div className="w-[260px] p-3">
      {/* Topics */}
      {topics && topics.length > 0 && (
        <div className="mb-3">
          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
            专栏
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {topics.map((topic) => (
              <NavigationMenu.Link
                closeOnClick
                className="rounded-full bg-neutral-100 px-2.5 py-1 text-[12px] text-neutral-600 transition hover:bg-accent/10 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800 dark:text-neutral-400"
                key={topic.slug}
                render={<Link href={`/notes/topics/${topic.slug}`} />}
              >
                {topic.icon && <span className="mr-1">{topic.icon}</span>}
                {topic.name}
              </NavigationMenu.Link>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Latest note */}
      {latestNoteId && (
        <div className="border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
          <NavigationMenu.Link
            closeOnClick
            className="flex items-center justify-between text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
            render={<Link href={`/notes/${latestNoteId.nid}`} />}
          >
            <span>查看最新手记</span>
            <span>#{latestNoteId.nid}</span>
          </NavigationMenu.Link>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="mt-2 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
        <NavigationMenu.Link
          closeOnClick
          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
          render={<Link href={section.path} />}
        >
          查看全部手记
        </NavigationMenu.Link>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// === Timeline: Category list + recent entries ===
export const TimelineDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const items = section.subMenu || []

  const { data: topData } = useQuery({
    queryKey: ['nav-top'],
    queryFn: async () =>
      (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized as AggregateTop,
    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
  })

  const recentEntries = mergeAndSortTopEntries(topData)

  return (
    <div className="w-[360px] p-2.5">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-[140px_1fr] gap-3">
        {/* Left: subMenu items */}
        <div>
          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
            分类
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
            {items.map((item) => {
              const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
              return (
                <NavigationMenu.Link
                  closeOnClick
                  className="flex items-center gap-2.5 rounded-md px-2.5 py-2 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
                  key={item.path}
                  render={
                    isExternal ? (
                      <a
                        href={item.path}
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                        target="_blank"
                      />
                    ) : (
                      <Link href={item.path} />
                    )
                  }
                >
                  {!!item.icon && (
                    <span className="flex w-4 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm opacity-70">
                      {item.icon}
                    </span>
                  )}
                  <span>
                    {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
                  </span>
                </NavigationMenu.Link>
              )
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right: recent entries */}
        <div>
          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
            近期动态
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
            {recentEntries.map((entry) => (
              <NavigationMenu.Link
                closeOnClick
                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
                key={entry.id}
                render={<Link href={entry.href} />}
              >
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                  <span className="text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
                    {entry.type === 'post' ? '文稿' : '手记'}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="text-[13px] leading-snug">{entry.title}</div>
                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
                  <RelativeTime date={entry.created} />
                </div>
              </NavigationMenu.Link>
            ))}
            {recentEntries.length === 0 && (
              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
                ...
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

interface TimelineEntry {
  id: string
  title: string
  created: string
  href: string
  type: 'post' | 'note'
}

function mergeAndSortTopEntries(
  topData: AggregateTop | undefined,
): TimelineEntry[] {
  if (!topData) return []
  const entries: TimelineEntry[] = []

  for (const post of topData.posts ?? []) {
    entries.push({
      id: post.id,
      title: post.title,
      created: post.created,
      href: `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`,
      type: 'post',
    })
  }
  for (const note of topData.notes ?? []) {
    entries.push({
      id: note.id,
      title: note.title,
      created: note.created,
      href: `/notes/${note.nid}`,
      type: 'note',
    })
  }

  entries.sort(
    (a, b) => new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
  )
  return entries.slice(0, 4)
}

// === More: Single column with descriptions ===
export const MoreDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
  const t = useTranslations('common')
  const items = section.subMenu || []

  return (
    <div className="w-[220px] p-2">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        {items.map((item) => {
          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
          return (
            <NavigationMenu.Link
              closeOnClick
              className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2.5 text-left transition hover:bg-accent/5"
              key={item.path}
              render={
                isExternal ? (
                  <a
                    href={item.path}
                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
                    target="_blank"
                  />
                ) : (
                  <Link href={item.path} />
                )
              }
            >
              {!!item.icon && (
                <span className="flex w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-base opacity-70">
                  {item.icon}
                </span>
              )}
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                <div className="text-[13px]">
                  {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
                </div>
                {item.description && (
                  <div className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
                    {item.description}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </NavigationMenu.Link>
          )
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export const dropdownTypeMap: Record<string, FC<DropdownProps>> = {
  Home: HomeDropdownContent,
  Post: PostsDropdownContent,
  Note: NotesDropdownContent,
  Timeline: TimelineDropdownContent,
  More: MoreDropdownContent,
}
```

```text
   240→        {/* Right: Recent notes */}
   241→        <div>
   242→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   243→            近期手记
   244→          </div>
   245→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   246→            {recentNotes?.map((note) => (
   247→              <NavigationMenu.Link
   248→                closeOnClick
   249→                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
   250→                key={note.nid}
   251→                render={<Link href={`/notes/${note.nid}`} />}
   252→              >
   253→                <div className="truncate text-[13px] leading-snug">
   254→                  {note.title}
   255→                </div>
   256→                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   257→                  <RelativeTime date={note.created} />
   258→                </div>
   259→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   260→            ))}
   261→            {!recentNotes?.length && (
   262→              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   263→                ...
   264→              </div>
   265→            )}
   266→          </div>
   267→        </div>
   268→      </div>
   269→
   270→      <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
   271→        <NavigationMenu.Link
   272→          closeOnClick
   273→          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
   274→          render={<Link href={section.path} />}
   275→        >
   276→          查看全部手记
   277→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   278→        <NavigationMenu.Link
   279→          closeOnClick
   280→          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
   281→          render={<Link href="/notes/topics" />}
   282→        >
   283→          全部专栏
   284→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   285→      </div>
   286→    </div>
   287→  )
   288→}
   289→
   290→// === Timeline: Category list + recent entries ===
   291→export const TimelineDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   292→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   293→  const items = section.subMenu || []
   294→
   295→  const { data: topData } = useQuery({
   296→    queryKey: ['nav-top'],
   297→    queryFn: async () =>
   298→      (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized as AggregateTop,
   299→    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
   300→  })
   301→
   302→  const recentEntries = mergeAndSortTopEntries(topData)
   303→
   304→  return (
   305→    <div className="w-[360px] p-2.5">
   306→      <div className="grid grid-cols-[140px_1fr] gap-3">
   307→        {/* Left: subMenu items */}
   308→        <div>
   309→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   310→            分类
   311→          </div>
   312→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   313→            {items.map((item) => {
   314→              const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
   315→              return (
   316→                <NavigationMenu.Link
   317→                  closeOnClick
   318→                  className="flex items-center gap-2.5 rounded-md px-2.5 py-2 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
   319→                  key={item.path}
   320→                  render={
   321→                    isExternal ? (
   322→                      <a
   323→                        href={item.path}
   324→                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   325→                        target="_blank"
   326→                      />
   327→                    ) : (
   328→                      <Link href={item.path} />
   329→                    )
   330→                  }
   331→                >
   332→                  {!!item.icon && (
   333→                    <span className="flex w-4 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm opacity-70">
   334→                      {item.icon}
   335→                    </span>
   336→                  )}
   337→                  <span>
   338→                    {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
   339→                  </span>
   340→                </NavigationMenu.Link>
   341→              )
   342→            })}
   343→          </div>
   344→        </div>
   345→
   346→        {/* Right: recent entries */}
   347→        <div>
   348→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   349→            近期动态
   350→          </div>
   351→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   352→            {recentEntries.map((entry) => (
   353→              <NavigationMenu.Link
   354→                closeOnClick
   355→                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
   356→                key={entry.id}
   357→                render={<Link href={entry.href} />}
   358→              >
   359→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   360→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   361→                    {entry.type === 'post' ? '文稿' : '手记'}
   362→                  </span>
   363→                </div>
   364→                <div className="text-[13px] leading-snug">{entry.title}</div>
   365→                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   366→                  <RelativeTime date={entry.created} />
   367→                </div>
   368→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   369→            ))}
   370→            {recentEntries.length === 0 && (
   371→              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   372→                ...
   373→              </div>
   374→            )}
   375→          </div>
   376→        </div>
   377→      </div>
   378→    </div>
   379→  )
   380→}
   381→
   382→interface TimelineEntry {
   383→  created: string
   384→  href: string
   385→  id: string
   386→  title: string
   387→  type: 'post' | 'note'
   388→}
   389→
   390→function mergeAndSortTopEntries(
   391→  topData: AggregateTop | undefined,
   392→): TimelineEntry[] {
   393→  if (!topData) return []
   394→  const entries: TimelineEntry[] = []
   395→
   396→  for (const post of topData.posts ?? []) {
   397→    entries.push({
   398→      id: post.id,
   399→      title: post.title,
   400→      created: post.created,
   401→      href: `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`,
   402→      type: 'post',
   403→    })
   404→  }
   405→  for (const note of topData.notes ?? []) {
   406→    entries.push({
   407→      id: note.id,
   408→      title: note.title,
   409→      created: note.created,
   410→      href: `/notes/${note.nid}`,
   411→      type: 'note',
   412→    })
   413→  }
   414→
   415→  entries.sort(
   416→    (a, b) => new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
   417→  )
   418→  return entries.slice(0, 4)
   419→}
   420→
   421→// === More: Single column with descriptions ===
   422→export const MoreDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   423→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   424→  const items = section.subMenu || []
   425→
   426→  return (
   427→    <div className="w-[220px] p-2">
   428→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   429→        {items.map((item) => {
   430→          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
   431→          return (
   432→            <NavigationMenu.Link
   433→              closeOnClick
   434→              className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2.5 text-left transition hover:bg-accent/5"
   435→              key={item.path}
   436→              render={
   437→                isExternal ? (
   438→                  <a
   439→                    href={item.path}
   440→                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
   441→                    target="_blank"
   442→                  />
   443→                ) : (
   444→                  <Link href={item.path} />
   445→                )
   446→              }
   447→            >
   448→              {!!item.icon && (
   449→                <span className="flex w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-base opacity-70">
   450→                  {item.icon}
   451→                </span>
   452→              )}
   453→              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   454→                <div className="text-[13px]">
   455→                  {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
   456→                </div>
   457→                {item.description && (
   458→                  <div className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
   459→                    {item.description}
   460→                  </div>
   461→                )}
   462→              </div>
   463→            </NavigationMenu.Link>
   464→          )
   465→        })}
   466→      </div>
   467→    </div>
   468→  )
   469→}
   470→
   471→export const dropdownTypeMap: Record<string, FC<DropdownProps>> = {
   472→  Home: HomeDropdownContent,
   473→  Post: PostsDropdownContent,
   474→  Note: NotesDropdownContent,
   475→  Timeline: TimelineDropdownContent,
   476→  More: MoreDropdownContent,
   477→}
   478→
```
</details></tool-use>
