<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user wants to replicate a reference UI/UX design (direction-aware shared dropdown navigation menu) into the Shiroi blog's desktop header. The work was divided into phases:
   - Phase 1 (COMPLETED): Skeleton implementation with `@base-ui/react` v1.3.0 `NavigationMenu`, type-based dropdown dispatch, and per-section differentiated layouts
   - Phase 2 (COMPLETED): API integration for dynamic data in dropdown contents (category hover preview, topics, recent notes, timeline entries)
   - Post-Phase 2: UI polish (topic icon fix, move Topic from Timeline to Notes, rounded corners adjustment) and i18n extraction (IN PROGRESS)

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - `@base-ui/react` v1.3.0 `NavigationMenu` (Root, List, Item, Trigger, Content, Link, Icon, Portal, Positioner, Popup, Viewport)
   - `NavigationMenu.Viewport` with `data-activation-direction` for direction-aware slide animations
   - CSS `@starting-style` / `[data-ending-style]` for enter/exit animations
   - Framer Motion (`motion/react`) `layoutId` for active nav indicator
   - Type-based dropdown dispatch via `dropdownTypeMap` instead of `hasSubMenu` check
   - `useQuery` from TanStack Query for lazy data fetching in dropdown contents with `staleTime` caching
   - `CategoryWithChildrenModel` from `@mx-space/api-client` (has `.children` with posts)
   - `TopicModel` has `icon` as URL (not emoji), `name`, `slug`, `description?`, `introduce`
   - `AggregateTop` from `getTop()` returns `{ notes: AggregateTopNote[], posts: AggregateTopPost[], says: SayModel[] }`
   - `note.getList(page, perPage)` returns `PaginateResult<NoteModel>`
   - `useAggregationSelector`, `useActivity()`, `useOwnerStatus()` hooks for owner data
   - `next-intl` `useTranslations('common')` for i18n with `titleKey`/`descriptionKey` pattern
   - `IHeaderMenu` interface with `type`, `titleKey`, `descriptionKey` fields

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/config.ts`** (MODIFIED)
     - Defines `IHeaderMenu` interface and `headerMenuConfig` array
     - Added `descriptionKey?: string` to interface
     - Added `type: 'Timeline'` to 时光, `type: 'Thinking'` to 思考, `type: 'More'` to 更多
     - Removed 专栏 entry from 时光's subMenu
     - Changed 更多 subMenu items from `description` to `descriptionKey` (e.g., `descriptionKey: 'nav_friends_desc'`)
     - Current state of interface:
     ```ts
     export interface IHeaderMenu {
       description?: string
       descriptionKey?: string
       do?: () => void
       exclude?: string[]
       icon?: ReactNode
       path: string
       search?: Record<string, string>
       subMenu?: Omit<IHeaderMenu, 'exclude'>[]
       title: string
       titleKey?: string
       type?: string
     }
     ```

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/DropdownContents.tsx`** (CREATED + MODIFIED multiple times)
     - Contains 5 dropdown content components + `dropdownTypeMap` export
     - `HomeDropdownContent`: Owner avatar + name + status/activity + pages tag pills. Uses `useAggregationSelector`, `useActivity()`, `useOwnerStatus()`. I18n partially applied (last edit).
     - `PostsDropdownContent`: Two-column with categories (hover-tracked via `useState<string | null>`) + lazy-fetched recent posts via `useQuery` with `getCategoryByIdOrSlug`. Query key: `['nav-category-posts', hoveredSlug]`, staleTime 5min.
     - `NotesDropdownContent`: Two-column with topics from `topic.getAll()` (query key `['nav-topics']`, staleTime 10min) + recent 4 notes from `note.getList(1, 4)` (query key `['nav-recent-notes']`, staleTime 5min). Footer has "查看全部手记" and "全部专栏" links.
     - `TimelineDropdownContent`: Two-column with subMenu items + recent entries from `aggregate.getTop(5)` (query key `['nav-top']`, staleTime 5min), merged/sorted via `mergeAndSortTopEntries()` helper.
     - `MoreDropdownContent`: Single column with icon + title + description.
     - **I18N STATUS**: Only `HomeDropdownContent` has been updated with `t()` calls. The other 4 components still have hardcoded Chinese strings.

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderContent.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Core component: replaced `hasSubMenu` dispatch with `dropdownTypeMap[section.type]` lookup
     - Import added: `import { dropdownTypeMap } from './DropdownContents'`
     - Popup rounded changed from `rounded-xl` to `rounded-2xl`
     - NavigationMenu.Content simplified to `<DropdownContent section={section} />` instead of generic grid
     - Chevron icon removed from NavigationMenu.Icon (kept in code for trigger items with dropdown)

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/nav-menu.css`** (unchanged from Phase 1)
     - Direction-aware animation styles for positioner, popup, viewport, content, chevron

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/HeaderDataConfigureProvider.tsx`** (unchanged)
     - Dynamically injects `pageMeta` → Home subMenu, `categories` → Post subMenu
     - Uses `useAggregationSelector` for pageMeta and categories
     - Clone function uses spread `...item` which inherits `descriptionKey` automatically

   - **`apps/web/src/messages/zh/common.json`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added 15 new keys after `nav_travel`:
     ```json
     "nav_dropdown_using": "正在使用 {name}",
     "nav_dropdown_online": "在线",
     "nav_dropdown_categories": "分类",
     "nav_dropdown_recent_suffix": " · 最近",
     "nav_dropdown_view_all_posts": "查看全部文稿",
     "nav_dropdown_posts_count": "{count} 篇",
     "nav_dropdown_recent_notes": "近期手记",
     "nav_dropdown_view_all_notes": "查看全部手记",
     "nav_dropdown_view_all_topics": "全部专栏",
     "nav_dropdown_recent_activity": "近期动态",
     "nav_friends_desc": "互联网上的朋友们",
     "nav_projects_desc": "开源项目与作品集",
     "nav_says_desc": "言语的碎片",
     "nav_travel_desc": "空间跃迁门",
     ```

   - **`apps/web/src/messages/en/common.json`** (MODIFIED)
     - Same 15 keys with English translations

   - **`apps/web/src/messages/ja/common.json`** (MODIFIED)
     - Same 15 keys with Japanese translations

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **All TS diagnostics throughout** (e.g., `Property 'div' does not exist on JSX.IntrinsicElements`, `Cannot find module`): Pre-existing project-level moduleResolution config issues, NOT introduced by changes. Confirmed safe to ignore.
   - **`topic.icon` rendering as URL text**: User reported topic icons showing as long URL strings. `topic.icon` is a URL (like `https://mx.innei.in/api/v2/objects/icon/...png`), not emoji. Fixed by changing `<span>{topic.icon}</span>` to `<img alt="" className="size-4 shrink-0 rounded object-cover" src={topic.icon} />`.
   - **ESLint lint path issues**: First attempts to lint with wrong paths (`apps/web/src/...` from monorepo root). Fixed by running from `apps/web` directory with `src/...` relative paths.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Determined optimal API for category hover preview: `getCategoryByIdOrSlug` returns `CategoryWithChildrenModel` with `.children` containing `Pick<PostModel, 'id' | 'title' | 'slug' | 'modified' | 'created'>[]`
   - Chose `note.getList(1, 4)` over `getTop()` for notes dropdown since `getTop` mixes posts and notes (might return few notes)
   - Used shared `getTop(5)` query key `['nav-top']` for timeline dropdown
   - `mergeAndSortTopEntries` helper merges posts + notes from `AggregateTop`, sorts by created desc, takes first 4
   - `descriptionKey` pattern in config.ts follows existing `titleKey` convention for i18n

6. All user messages:
   - (Context continuation from previous conversation - user had approved design with "可以")
   - "开始实现 2" — Start Phase 2 API integration
   - "这个 note content 能不能再优化一下？如果把它做成两栏的话，你觉得应该怎么去做呢？其实我觉得也可以是有那种历史的，不一定是只有最新的一篇吧，有点单调。" — Improve NotesDropdownContent to two-column with history
   - "专栏的图片现在裂掉了，会显示一长串的图片地址，这个要优化。" (with screenshot) — Fix broken topic icon rendering
   - ""时光"里面的 Topic 删掉，放到 Note 的 content 中" — Move Topic from Timeline to Notes dropdown
   - "然后调整整个 Popover 的圆角。因为我们现在的这个 header 的药丸形状，它的圆角是很大的，所以最好我们能保持一致。" — Increase popup border radius
   - "现在开始提取所有的 i18n" — Extract all hardcoded strings to i18n

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Complete i18n extraction in DropdownContents.tsx for remaining 4 components:
     - `PostsDropdownContent`: Replace `分类`, `· 最近`, `查看全部文稿`, `{count} 篇`
     - `NotesDropdownContent`: Replace `专栏` (use existing `nav_topics`), `近期手记`, `查看全部手记`, `全部专栏`
     - `TimelineDropdownContent`: Replace `分类`, `近期动态`, `文稿`/`手记` (use existing `nav_posts`/`nav_notes`)
     - `MoreDropdownContent`: Replace `item.description` with `item.descriptionKey ? t(item.descriptionKey as any) : item.description`

8. Current Work:

```text
   123→                className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[13px] transition data-[hovered]:bg-accent/5 data-[hovered]:text-accent"
   124→                data-hovered={hoveredSlug === cat.slug ? '' : undefined}
   125→                key={cat.slug}
   126→                render={<Link href={`/categories/${cat.slug}`} />}
   127→                onMouseEnter={() => setHoveredSlug(cat.slug)}
   128→              >
   129→                <span>{cat.name}</span>
   130→                <span className="text-[11px] text-neutral-400">
   131→                  {cat.count}
   132→                </span>
   133→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   134→            ))}
   135→          </div>
   136→        </div>
   137→
   138→        {/* Right: Recent posts */}
   139→        <div>
   140→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   141→            {categories?.find((c) => c.slug === hoveredSlug)?.name}
   142→            {t('nav_dropdown_recent_suffix')}
   143→          </div>
   144→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   145→            {recentPosts?.map((post) => (
   146→              <NavigationMenu.Link
   147→                closeOnClick
   148→                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
   149→                key={post.id}
   150→                render={
   151→                  <Link
   152→                    href={`/posts/${hoveredSlug}/${post.slug}`}
   153→                  />
   154→                }
   155→              >
   156→                <div className="text-[13px] leading-snug">{post.title}</div>
   157→                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   158→                  <RelativeTime date={post.created} />
   159→                </div>
   160→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   161→            ))}
   162→            {!recentPosts?.length && (
   163→              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   164→                ...
   165→              </div>
   166→            )}
   167→          </div>
   168→        </div>
   169→      </div>
   170→
   171→      <div className="mt-2 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
   172→        <NavigationMenu.Link
   173→          closeOnClick
   174→          className="flex items-center justify-between text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
   175→          render={<Link href={section.path} onClick={section.do} />}
   176→        >
   177→          <span>{t('nav_dropdown_view_all_posts')}</span>
   178→          <span>
   179→            {t('nav_dropdown_posts_count', { count: categories?.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.count, 0) ?? 0 })}
   180→          </span>
   181→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   182→      </div>
   183→    </div>
   184→  )
   185→}
   186→
   187→// === Notes: Topics + recent notes (two columns) ===
   188→export const NotesDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   189→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   190→  const { data: topics } = useQuery({
   191→    queryKey: ['nav-topics'],
   192→    queryFn: async () => {
   193→      const data = await apiClient.topic.getAll()
   194→      return data.$serialized.data
   195→    },
   196→    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10,
   197→  })
   198→
   199→  const { data: noteList } = useQuery({
   200→    queryKey: ['nav-recent-notes'],
   201→    queryFn: async () => {
   202→      const data = await apiClient.note.getList(1, 4)
   203→      return data.$serialized
   204→    },
   205→    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
   206→  })
   207→
   208→  const recentNotes = noteList?.data
   209→
   210→  return (
   211→    <div className="w-[380px] p-3">
   212→      <div className="grid grid-cols-[140px_1fr] gap-3">
   213→        {/* Left: Topics */}
   214→        <div>
   215→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   216→            {t('nav_topics')}
   217→          </div>
   218→          {topics && topics.length > 0 ? (
   219→            <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   220→              {topics.map((topic) => (
   221→                <NavigationMenu.Link
   222→                  closeOnClick
   223→                  className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
   224→                  key={topic.slug}
   225→                  render={<Link href={`/notes/topics/${topic.slug}`} />}
   226→                >
   227→                  {topic.icon && (
   228→                    <img
   229→                      alt=""
   230→                      className="size-4 shrink-0 rounded object-cover"
   231→                      src={topic.icon}
   232→                    />
   233→                  )}
   234→                  <span className="truncate">{topic.name}</span>
   235→                </NavigationMenu.Link>
   236→              ))}
   237→            </div>
   238→          ) : (
   239→            <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   240→              ...
   241→            </div>
   242→          )}
   243→        </div>
   244→
   245→        {/* Right: Recent notes */}
   246→        <div>
   247→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   248→            {t('nav_dropdown_recent_notes')}
   249→          </div>
   250→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   251→            {recentNotes?.map((note) => (
   252→              <NavigationMenu.Link
   253→                closeOnClick
   254→                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
   255→                key={note.nid}
   256→                render={<Link href={`/notes/${note.nid}`} />}
   257→              >
   258→                <div className="truncate text-[13px] leading-snug">
   259→                  {note.title}
   260→                </div>
   261→                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   262→                  <RelativeTime date={note.created} />
   263→                </div>
   264→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   265→            ))}
   266→            {!recentNotes?.length && (
   267→              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   268→                ...
   269→              </div>
   270→            )}
   271→          </div>
   272→        </div>
   273→      </div>
   274→
   275→      <div className="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
   276→        <NavigationMenu.Link
   277→          closeOnClick
   278→          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
   279→          render={<Link href={section.path} />}
   280→        >
   281→          {t('nav_dropdown_view_all_notes')}
   282→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   283→        <NavigationMenu.Link
   284→          closeOnClick
   285→          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
   286→          render={<Link href="/notes/topics" />}
   287→        >
   288→          {t('nav_dropdown_view_all_topics')}
   289→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   290→      </div>
   291→    </div>
   292→  )
   293→}
   294→
   295→// === Timeline: Category list + recent entries ===
   296→export const TimelineDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   297→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   298→  const items = section.subMenu || []
   299→
   300→  const { data: topData } = useQuery({
   301→    queryKey: ['nav-top'],
   302→    queryFn: async () =>
   303→      (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized as AggregateTop,
   304→    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
   305→  })
   306→
   307→  const recentEntries = mergeAndSortTopEntries(topData)
   308→
   309→  return (
   310→    <div className="w-[360px] p-2.5">
   311→      <div className="grid grid-cols-[140px_1fr] gap-3">
   312→        {/* Left: subMenu items */}
   313→        <div>
   314→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   315→            {t('nav_dropdown_categories')}
   316→          </div>
   317→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   318→            {items.map((item) => {
   319→              const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
   320→              return (
   321→                <NavigationMenu.Link
   322→                  closeOnClick
   323→                  className="flex items-center gap-2.5 rounded-md px-2.5 py-2 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
   324→                  key={item.path}
   325→                  render={
   326→                    isExternal ? (
   327→                      <a
   328→                        href={item.path}
   329→                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   330→                        target="_blank"
   331→                      />
   332→                    ) : (
   333→                      <Link href={item.path} />
   334→                    )
   335→                  }
   336→                >
   337→                  {!!item.icon && (
   338→                    <span className="flex w-4 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm opacity-70">
   339→                      {item.icon}
   340→                    </span>
   341→                  )}
   342→                  <span>
   343→                    {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
   344→                  </span>
   345→                </NavigationMenu.Link>
   346→              )
   347→            })}
   348→          </div>
   349→        </div>
   350→
   351→        {/* Right: recent entries */}
   352→        <div>
   353→          <div className="mb-2 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   354→            {t('nav_dropdown_recent_activity')}
   355→          </div>
   356→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   357→            {recentEntries.map((entry) => (
   358→              <NavigationMenu.Link
   359→                closeOnClick
   360→                className="rounded-md bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
   361→                key={entry.id}
   362→                render={<Link href={entry.href} />}
   363→              >
   364→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   365→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   366→                    {entry.type === 'post' ? t('nav_posts') : t('nav_notes')}
   367→                  </span>
   368→                </div>
   369→                <div className="text-[13px] leading-snug">{entry.title}</div>
   370→                <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   371→                  <RelativeTime date={entry.created} />
   372→                </div>
   373→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   374→            ))}
   375→            {recentEntries.length === 0 && (
   376→              <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   377→                ...
   378→              </div>
   379→            )}
   380→          </div>
   381→        </div>
   382→      </div>
   383→    </div>
   384→  )
   385→}
   386→
   387→interface TimelineEntry {
   388→  created: string
   389→  href: string
   390→  id: string
   391→  title: string
   392→  type: 'post' | 'note'
   393→}
   394→
   395→function mergeAndSortTopEntries(
   396→  topData: AggregateTop | undefined,
   397→): TimelineEntry[] {
   398→  if (!topData) return []
   399→  const entries: TimelineEntry[] = []
   400→
   401→  for (const post of topData.posts ?? []) {
   402→    entries.push({
   403→      id: post.id,
   404→      title: post.title,
   405→      created: post.created,
   406→      href: `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`,
   407→      type: 'post',
   408→    })
   409→  }
   410→  for (const note of topData.notes ?? []) {
   411→    entries.push({
   412→      id: note.id,
   413→      title: note.title,
   414→      created: note.created,
   415→      href: `/notes/${note.nid}`,
   416→      type: 'note',
   417→    })
   418→  }
   419→
   420→  entries.sort(
   421→    (a, b) => new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
   422→  )
   423→  return entries.slice(0, 4)
   424→}
   425→
   426→// === More: Single column with descriptions ===
   427→export const MoreDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   428→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   429→  const items = section.subMenu || []
   430→
   431→  return (
   432→    <div className="w-[220px] p-2">
   433→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   434→        {items.map((item) => {
   435→          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
   436→          return (
   437→            <NavigationMenu.Link
   438→              closeOnClick
   439→              className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2.5 text-left transition hover:bg-accent/5"
   440→              key={item.path}
   441→              render={
   442→                isExternal ? (
   443→                  <a
   444→                    href={item.path}
   445→                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
   446→                    target="_blank"
   447→                  />
   448→                ) : (
   449→                  <Link href={item.path} />
   450→                )
   451→              }
   452→            >
   453→              {!!item.icon && (
   454→                <span className="flex w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-base opacity-70">
   455→                  {item.icon}
   456→                </span>
   457→              )}
   458→              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   459→                <div className="text-[13px]">
   460→                  {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
   461→                </div>
   462→                {(item.descriptionKey || item.description) && (
   463→                  <div className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
   464→                    {item.descriptionKey ? t(item.descriptionKey as any) : item.description}
   465→                  </div>
   466→                )}
   467→              </div>
   468→            </NavigationMenu.Link>
   469→          )
   470→        })}
   471→      </div>
   472→    </div>
   473→  )
   474→}
   475→
   476→export const dropdownTypeMap: Record<string, FC<DropdownProps>> = {
   477→  Home: HomeDropdownContent,
   478→  Post: PostsDropdownContent,
   479→  Note: NotesDropdownContent,
   480→  Timeline: TimelineDropdownContent,
   481→  More: MoreDropdownContent,
   482→}
   483→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   106→    [t],
   107→  )
   108→
   109→  return (
   110→    <NavigationMenu.Root
   111→      closeDelay={150}
   112→      delay={80}
   113→      render={<m.nav layout="size" />}
   114→      className={clsxm(
   115→        'relative',
   116→        'rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-neutral-50/70 to-neutral-50/90',
   117→        'shadow-lg shadow-neutral-800/5 ring-1 ring-neutral-900/5 backdrop-blur-md',
   118→        'dark:from-neutral-900/70 dark:to-neutral-800/90 dark:ring-neutral-100/10',
   119→        'group [--spotlight-color:oklch(from_var(--color-accent)_l_c_h_/_0.12)]',
   120→        'pointer-events-auto duration-200',
   121→        shouldHideNavBg && 'bg-none! shadow-none! ring-transparent!',
   122→        className,
   123→      )}
   124→      onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
   125→    >
   126→      {/* Spotlight overlay */}
   127→      <m.div
   128→        aria-hidden="true"
   129→        className="pointer-events-none absolute -inset-px rounded-full opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-500 group-hover:opacity-100"
   130→        style={{ background }}
   131→      />
   132→
   133→      <NavigationMenu.List className="flex list-none px-4 font-medium text-neutral-9">
   134→        {headerMenuConfig.map((section) => {
   135→          const DropdownContent = section.type
   136→            ? dropdownTypeMap[section.type]
   137→            : undefined
   138→
   139→          const subItemActive =
   140→            section.subMenu?.findIndex(
   141→              (item) =>
   142→                item.path === pathname ||
   143→                pathname.slice(1) === item.path ||
   144→                pathname.startsWith(`${item.path}/`),
   145→            ) ?? -1
   146→
   147→          const isActive =
   148→            pathname === section.path ||
   149→            (pathname.startsWith(`${section.path}/`) &&
   150→              !section.exclude?.includes(pathname)) ||
   151→            subItemActive > -1 ||
   152→            false
   153→
   154→          const activeSubItem = section.subMenu?.[subItemActive]
   155→
   156→          let href = section.path
   157→          if (section.search) {
   158→            href += `?${new URLSearchParams(section.search).toString()}`
   159→          }
   160→
   161→          if (DropdownContent) {
   162→            return (
   163→              <NavigationMenu.Item key={section.path} value={section.path}>
   164→                <NavigationMenu.Trigger
   165→                  className={clsxm(
   166→                    'relative inline-flex cursor-pointer items-center whitespace-nowrap border-none bg-transparent px-4 py-2 transition duration-200',
   167→                    isActive ? 'text-accent' : 'hover:text-accent/80',
   168→                  )}
   169→                >
   170→                  <span className="relative flex items-center">
   171→                    {isActive && (
   172→                      <m.span
   173→                        className="mr-2 flex items-center"
   174→                        layoutId={animatedIcon ? 'header-menu-icon' : undefined}
   175→                      >
   176→                        {activeSubItem?.icon ?? section.icon}
   177→                      </m.span>
   178→                    )}
   179→                    <m.span layout>
   180→                      {activeSubItem
   181→                        ? getTitle(activeSubItem)
   182→                        : getTitle(section)}
   183→                    </m.span>
   184→                  </span>
   185→
   186→                  {isActive && (
   187→                    <m.span
   188→                      layoutId="active-nav-item"
   189→                      className={clsx(
   190→                        'absolute inset-x-1 -bottom-px h-px',
   191→                        'bg-gradient-to-r from-accent/0 via-accent/70 to-accent/0',
   192→                      )}
   193→                    />
   194→                  )}
   195→                </NavigationMenu.Trigger>
   196→                <NavigationMenu.Content className="nav-menu-content">
   197→                  <DropdownContent section={section} />
   198→                </NavigationMenu.Content>
   199→              </NavigationMenu.Item>
   200→            )
   201→          }
   202→
   203→          const isExternal = href.startsWith('http')
   204→          return (
   205→            <NavigationMenu.Item key={section.path}>
   206→              <NavigationMenu.Link
   207→                active={isActive}
   208→                className={clsxm(
   209→                  'relative block whitespace-nowrap px-4 py-2 transition duration-200',
   210→                  isActive ? 'text-accent' : 'hover:text-accent/80',
   211→                )}
   212→                render={
   213→                  isExternal ? (
   214→                    <a href={href} target="_blank" />
   215→                  ) : (
   216→                    <Link href={href} onClick={section.do} />
   217→                  )
   218→                }
   219→              >
   220→                <span className="relative flex items-center">
   221→                  {isActive && (
   222→                    <m.span
   223→                      className="mr-2 flex items-center"
   224→                      layoutId={animatedIcon ? 'header-menu-icon' : undefined}
   225→                    >
   226→                      {activeSubItem?.icon ?? section.icon}
   227→                    </m.span>
   228→                  )}
   229→                  <m.span layout>
   230→                    {activeSubItem
   231→                      ? getTitle(activeSubItem)
   232→                      : getTitle(section)}
   233→                  </m.span>
   234→                </span>
   235→                {isActive && (
   236→                  <m.span
   237→                    layoutId="active-nav-item"
   238→                    className={clsx(
   239→                      'absolute inset-x-1 -bottom-px h-px',
   240→                      'bg-gradient-to-r from-accent/0 via-accent/70 to-accent/0',
   241→                    )}
   242→                  />
   243→                )}
   244→              </NavigationMenu.Link>
   245→            </NavigationMenu.Item>
   246→          )
   247→        })}
   248→      </NavigationMenu.List>
   249→
   250→      <NavigationMenu.Portal>
   251→        <NavigationMenu.Positioner
   252→          className="nav-menu-positioner"
   253→          sideOffset={12}
   254→        >
   255→          <NavigationMenu.Popup
   256→            className={clsxm(
   257→              'nav-menu-popup',
   258→              'select-none rounded-2xl bg-neutral-50/60 outline-hidden dark:bg-neutral-900/60',
   259→              'border border-neutral-900/5 shadow-lg shadow-neutral-800/5 backdrop-blur-md',
   260→              'dark:border-neutral-100/10',
   261→            )}
   262→          >
   263→            <NavigationMenu.Viewport className="nav-menu-viewport" />
   264→          </NavigationMenu.Popup>
   265→        </NavigationMenu.Positioner>
   266→      </NavigationMenu.Portal>
   267→    </NavigationMenu.Root>
   268→  )
   269→}
   270→
```
